sentences.arabic: رَأَى مِصْبَاحٌ كَلْبًا وَحِيدًا فِي الشَّارِعِ فَشَعَرَ بِالشَّفَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Misbah je vidio usamljenog psa na ulici i osjetio samilost.
sentences.translationEn: Misbah saw a lonely dog in the street and felt compassion.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضَرَ لَهُ الطَّعَامَ وَالْمَاءَ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Donio mu je hranu i vodu iz kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He brought it food and water from home.
The dog wagged its tail with joy.

sentences.arabic: الشُّعُورُ بِمَا يَشْعُرُ بِهِ غَيْرُنَا يَجْعَلُنَا أَكْثَرَ إِنْسَانِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Osjećati ono što osjećaju drugi čini nas humanijima.
sentences.translationEn: Feeling what others feel makes us more humane.
